title: Fancy Bees
description: Make your bees a little bit fancier by decorating their faces with a beautiful mustache!
body:
This is my first time messing around with custom Minecraft assets so I decided to start with something simple: Putting a mustache on a bee. 

Now our buzzy little friends can look a little bit fancier when you discover them in the wild. 




True Story, I got the idea for this because I bought my girlfriend a plush Minecraft Bee and we stuck a fake mustache on it, and it looked absolutely adorable and hilarious.
